title: celmisia verbascifolia subsp. verbascifolia
intro: Celmisia verbascifolia subsp. verbascifolia, commonly known as Mountain Clematis or Silver Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Celmisia verbascifolia subsp. verbascifolia include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful for topical applications. Celmisia verbascifolia subsp. verbascifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or creams for its medicinal and health benefits.
